fixed.$description: Fixed width for dropdown menu container - 182px (as per Figma design)

min.$description: Minimum width for dropdown menu container - 160px (for responsive/flexible layouts)

max.$description: Maximum width for dropdown menu container - 360px (for larger content)

background.$description: Dropdown menu background color - White (#ffffff) for clean, elevated surface

color.$description: Dropdown menu border color - Gray.300 (#d0d5dd) for subtle definition

width.$description: Dropdown menu border width - 1px for consistent border appearance

radius.$description: Dropdown menu border radius - 4px (as per Figma: rounded corners for modern feel)

shadow.$description: Dropdown menu box shadow - Layered shadow (2px + 4px) for elevated dropdown appearance with subtle depth

vertical.$description: Vertical padding (top and bottom) for dropdown container - 4px (as per Figma: spacing between container edge and items)

horizontal.$description: Horizontal padding (left and right) for dropdown container - 0px (items extend to edges)

direction.$description: Layout direction for menu items - Vertical stacking of dropdown list items

gap.$description: Gap between menu items - 2px (as per Figma: tight spacing between items for cohesive menu appearance)

items.$description: Item alignment within container - Items stretch to full width for consistent appearance

content.$description: Content alignment within container - Items aligned to top of container

sm.$description: Max height for small scrollable dropdown - 192px (approx. 6 items visible, ideal for compact menus)

md.$description: Max height for medium scrollable dropdown - 256px (approx. 8 items visible, standard dropdown size)

lg.$description: Max height for large scrollable dropdown - 360px (approx. 12+ items visible, for extensive menus)

width.$description: Scrollbar width for scrollable dropdown - 4px (subtle, minimal scrollbar for clean appearance)

thumb.$description: Scrollbar thumb color - Medium gray for visible but not distracting scrollbar handle

track.$description: Scrollbar track color - Light gray for subtle scrollbar background

z-index.$description: Z-index for dropdown menu overlay - Extra large z-index (typically 1000+) to ensure dropdown appears above other content

top.$description: Offset from trigger element - 2px gap between trigger button/field and dropdown for visual separation

open.$description: Animation duration for opening dropdown - 200ms for smooth, noticeable entrance animation

close.$description: Animation duration for closing dropdown - 150ms for quick exit (faster than open for snappy feel)

easing.$description: Animation easing function - 'ease-out' curve for natural, smooth motion (fast start, slow end)

padding.$description: Empty state container padding - 24px vertical, 16px horizontal for comfortable empty state message display

font.$description: Empty state text font - Small regular body text (13px) for subtle empty state messaging

color.$description: Empty state text color - Subtitle gray for de-emphasized empty state text

size.$description: Empty state icon size - Large icon (20px) for prominent empty state visual indicator

color.$description: Empty state icon color - Moderate neutral gray for subtle but visible empty state icon
